title: Findings-to-Artifact Contract
description: The typed intermediate the report-synthesizer produces from surviving findings and that every output channel renders (SPEC §6d). It separates the two orthogonal axes — the deliverable genre (what the document is) and the delivery channel (how it is rendered). Blog is the first-class channel; book and other channels arrive via optional channel packs. Every section traces to the MIF finding @ids it draws on, and every source is a MIF-shaped citation, so the citation-integrity and citation-leak gates run uniformly across all outputs.

genre.description: The deliverable genre (exec-summary, academic, engineering, …). 'general' when no genre pack is enabled.

namespace.description: The MIF namespace of the surviving finding set, carried through so the generic `report` projection can mint its urn:mif:report:<namespace>:<slug> id.

newsworthiness.description: The delta/newsworthiness signal the engine computes — the hook a publication pipeline needs (SPEC §6d).

finding_refs.description: The MIF finding @ids this artifact synthesizes (urn:mif:).

sections.description: Ordered body sections; the genre template defines which are required.

supports.description: MIF finding @ids this section draws on.

sources.description: MIF-shaped citations, deduplicated across the finding set. citationType/citationRole carry the full MIF Level-3 citation shape so a report projection (reports/<topic>/<slug>.md) validates at L3, not just title+url.

citationType.description: MIF citation source category (article, paper, documentation, …). Required so a report projection (reports/<topic>/<slug>.md) satisfies the MIF Level-3 citation shape — an artifact missing it cannot be rendered/validated as a report.

citationRole.description: MIF citation relationship to the claim (supports, background, …). Required for the same L3 report-projection reason as citationType.

mif.description: MIF output-conformance marker (SPEC §10). The report-synthesizer stamps how this artifact's report projection is to be treated by the MIF I/O conformance gate.

conformanceLevel.description: The MIF level the generic `report` projection of this artifact meets (3 for a falsification-graded report).
